questions.q: A federal judge temporarily blocked a $6.2 billion TV station merger between Nexstar Media Group and which rival company over antitrust concerns?
According to an investigation published in mid-April 2026, US tech firms successfully lobbied the EU to maintain secrecy regarding the environmental emissions of what facilities?
The federal government announced that eligible Canadians will receive a one-time top-up payment on June 5, 2026, aimed at helping with the cost of what?
questions.correctText: The federal government is implementing a one-time Canada Groceries and Essentials Benefit to help offset persistent grocery price increases.

questions.q: Struggling to compete with platforms like TikTok and Shein, which home shopping network pioneer recently filed for Chapter 11 bankruptcy protection?
In a recent test using the Atacama Cosmology Telescope to observe how galaxy clusters move toward one another, what did researchers conclude about gravity on cosmic scales?
options: It behaves as expected, strengthening the case for dark matter
It behaves unpredictably, disproving the existence of dark matter
It accelerates over distance, suggesting a new fundamental force
It reverses its effect across hundreds of millions of light-years
questions.correctText: It behaves as expected, strengthening the case for dark matter

questions.q: Recent federal inspections revealed that nursing homes in which state have been inappropriately discharging patients to homeless shelters?
The Ontario government recently faced criticism after purchasing a used $28.9-million private jet, a Bombardier Challenger 650, for which premier?
questions.correctText: Doug Ford's government purchased the $28.9-million used private jet to provide him with more flexible and secure travel.

questions.q: Which province's immigration minister, Malaya Marcelino, was recently rebuffed by Ottawa in her push for higher provincial nominee allocations?
questions.correctText: Manitoba's Immigration Minister Malaya Marcelino traveled to Ottawa to request an increase in immigration numbers, but the request was denied by Mark Carney's government.

questions.q: According to a recent 18-year longitudinal study, what generally happens to a person's tendency to procrastinate as they move through young adulthood?
A new PNAS study investigating romantic partner preferences found that a woman's traditional desire for a wealthier partner diminishes under what specific circumstance?
options: When women gain more economic power
When they move to a rural environment
When men display higher emotional intelligence
questions.correctText: When women gain more economic power
